sections.heading: State handling
sections.text: Represent the oscillator with explicit state variables and compute modulation or voltage references primarily from those oscillator states. Do not reduce VOC to a PI controller plus a small sinusoidal injection term.

sections.heading: Startup
sections.text: Initialize oscillator states to a finite amplitude and pair them with active current limiting during startup so the converter does not produce a large uncontrolled transient while the oscillator builds.

sections.heading: Waveform generation
sections.text: Generate three-phase references from the oscillator state itself or from an internally generated oscillator angle. Avoid using a fully independent fixed-frequency output angle that bypasses the oscillator dynamics.

sections.heading: Protection coordination
sections.text: Apply current limiting and modulation saturation as bounded nonlinear constraints around the oscillator-generated reference rather than replacing the oscillator with a pure magnitude PI loop.
